Name: FAnimNode_RigidBody
Description: Controller that simulates physics based on the physics asset of the skeletal mesh component

Variables.Name: OverridePhysicsAsset
Variables.Description: Physics asset to use. If empty use the skeletal mesh's default physics asset

Variables.Name: ExternalForce
Variables.Description: Applies a uniform external force in world space. This allows for easily faking inertia of movement while still simulating in component space for example

Variables.Name: OverlapChannel
Variables.Description: The channel we use to find static geometry to collide with

Variables.Name: SimulationSpace
Variables.Description: What space to simulate the bodies in. This affects how velocities are generated

Variables.Name: CachedBoundsScale
Variables.Description:
Scale of cached bounds (vs. actual bounds).
	  Increasing this may improve performance, but overlaps may not work as well.
	  (A value of 1.0 effectively disables cached bounds).
